positive: A stylized, minimalist celestial forest scene. Imagine bioluminescent flora and fauna set against a deep indigo, gradient cosmic background. The central element is a majestic, ethereal glowing deer (stags' profile silhouette) grazing among crystalline, oversized mushrooms and vines. The style should be highly detailed watercolor illustration meets modern vector art, utilizing strong silhouettes and vibrant neon pops of color (cyan, magenta, lime green) for contrast against the dark background. Perfect for screen printing on apparel. Composition must be balanced and symmetrical, centered for printing. Dramatic backlighting and soft glow effects are key. Cinematic, dreamlike, high contrast, clean lines, no photo realism, isolated subject.
negative: low detail, blurry, watermark, text, signature, dirty, grain, noise, artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, poorly rendered, grayscale, realistic photo, logo, trademark, copyrighted, cartoon, bokeh
